  1. Home
  2. Custom Signs
  3. A-Frame Signs
  4. Signicade Deluxe A-Frame

Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Sidewalk Sign

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame is perfect for outdoor advertisements. It is water-resistant and maintenance-free. You can select a white or black A frame. The plastic A-Frame can be filled with water or sand for increased durability. The A-Frame has molded handles so it can easily be transported. If you would like to have a double-sided printed sign, please contact a customer service representative.

Great For:
Outdoor Restaurant Menus Business Grand Openings
Church Service Times Advertising a Storefront Sale
Order Complete Kit
Order Replacement Signs
Order Replacement Hardware

Complete Kit

Kit Includes
1 — Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Hardware

2 — 24" x 36" Full-Color Printed Signs
Order Complete Kit

More About Signicade Deluxe A-Frames Return to Top

The A-Frame material is digitally printed on a 4mm corrugated plastic material. The material has hollow flutes similar to cardboard. The material is lightweight and waterproof.

The frame holds (2) 24" x 36" printed signs—one on each side. This allows you to double your advertising while maintaining a small footprint! You can even customize each sign to say something different. Tell your guests, 'Welcome', on one side when they walk in, and 'Goodbye' on their way out of your store.

Each Signicade A-Frame is foldable, making it easy to store. This allows you to save space. Even better, it has a handle that makes it a breeze to carry from inside to outside.

Why Choose Banners.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Quality Products

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)?

An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding sign used to advertise in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, outdoor restaurants, and near parking lots.

Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round?

Yes. The frame is made from durable plastic that won’t rust or splinter, and it can be filled with sand or water for extra stability outdoors.

Does the Signicade Deluxe A-frame include one or two printed signs?

It includes two (2) full-color printed signs, sized 24" × 36" (one for each side).

Do you offer more than one color of Signicade Deluxe A-frame?

Yes—Signicade Deluxe A-frames are available in white or black.

Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles?

Yes. In addition to the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36"), you also offer the Simpo Sign A-frame (22" × 27") and Coroplast A-frame signs in 12" × 18", 18" × 24", 22" × 28", and 24" × 36".

Return to Top
